figures.title: Diabetes rate for each symptom
figures.caption: Of the people who reported a symptom, the share who turned out diabetic. Bars past the dashed line are red flags: that symptom means above-average risk.

figures.title: Which symptoms matter most
figures.caption: How much each symptom moves the model's estimate. The bigger the bar, the more that symptom pushes your risk up or down.

figures.title: Who is in the data
figures.caption: How many of the 1000 people were diagnosed, and how age spreads across outcomes.
